final_deliverables: Complete Methods and Supplementary Information drafts.
Complete figure and table package plan with legends.
Data, code, and software availability statements.
Mandatory Reporting Summary registered for package assembly.
Claim-to-evidence, figure-to-artifact, methods-to-code, and statistic ledgers.
PanelForge manifest, rendered panels, pinned engine commit, and render report after Stage 9.6b executes.
Contract and schema layer with all gate verdict JSON files.
Cross-document consistency, statistical language, reader-surface hygiene, and internal peer-review reports.
PI review packet, submission-readiness checklist, Stage 9 completion report, and updated roadmap memory.

patch_ledger.summary: Every substage emits a falsifiable gate verdict JSON.
patch_ledger.title: Machine-checkable gates

patch_ledger.summary: Claims, paragraphs, figures, artifacts, references, and statistics use immutable IDs.
patch_ledger.title: Stable IDs and pinned ledger schemas

patch_ledger.summary: Substages stage, gate, promote, or quarantine without partially writing canonical outputs.
patch_ledger.title: Atomic idempotent writes

patch_ledger.summary: References are resolved through the future reference-management route before manuscript use.
patch_ledger.title: Citation anti-fabrication routing

patch_ledger.summary: Reported statistics are recomputed from frozen artifacts before promotion.
patch_ledger.title: Numbers-are-live provenance

patch_ledger.summary: Stage 9.0 checks Stage 7 headline-result coverage before claim freeze.
patch_ledger.title: Entry-gate ordering-loop fix

patch_ledger.summary: Publication-surface hygiene blocks internal scaffold leakage before package assembly.
patch_ledger.title: Reader-surface hygiene

patch_ledger.summary: Content type, Reporting Summary, code review, subheading, reference, and discovery-fit rules are pinned downstream.
patch_ledger.title: Nature Methods venue corrections

patch_ledger.summary: Project-specific method nouns and venue choices live in the project binding block.
patch_ledger.title: Scope-fork resolution

patch_ledger.summary: PanelForge is version-bound for future deterministic figure rendering through Stage 9.6b.
patch_ledger.title: Figure-engine integration

gate_predicates: schema files are valid JSON objects with required field declarations
every declared Stage 9 ledger maps to exactly one schema
substages.objective: Make downstream gates machine-checkable and ledgers joinable before evidence intake.
substages.title: Contract and schema layer

gate_predicates: artifacts validate or are scoped out
headline Stage 7 results map to ART IDs
substages.objective: Confirm that manuscript assembly can begin from frozen, typed Stage 7 evidence.
substages.title: Stage 7 evidence intake and lock

gate_predicates: cached sources have URL and access date
substages.objective: Bind manuscript process to official and cached Nature Methods guidance.
substages.title: Venue guidance source register

gate_predicates: corpus has the planned DOI count
each entry records novelty, benchmarks, biology, software, limitations, and availability
substages.objective: Create a structural corpus of successful computational methods papers.
substages.title: Representative methods-paper corpus

substages.objective: Pin paper type, content type, and venue-fit decision before drafting.
substages.title: Archetype, content type, and narrative spine

gate_predicates: every claim has a strength cap
substages.objective: Freeze claim hierarchy with stable CLM IDs and strength caps.
substages.title: Manuscript claim freeze

gate_predicates: every PARA ID resolves to a CLM ID
paragraph strength does not exceed claim strength
substages.objective: Plan manuscript paragraphs as auditable claim-bearing units.
substages.title: Paragraph-level claim ledger

gate_predicates: every figure resolves to claims and artifacts
central evidence is not buried in supplement
substages.objective: Build the manuscript around evidence-bearing display items before prose.
substages.title: Figure-first manuscript spine

gate_predicates: figure engine version equals pinned ref
every fig_id has an existing render_path
every rendered entry records a recipe and rejected alternative
S1 manifest keys contain no claim IDs, artifact IDs, or pipeline-state tokens
gallery drift is passing or explicitly accepted
substages.objective: Prepare deterministic publication-grade figure rendering from the frozen figure-to-claim-to-artifact contract.
substages.title: Figure rendering via PanelForge

gate_predicates: each item has callout and role
substages.objective: Plan supplementary material as cited support rather than a data dump.
substages.title: Supplementary display item plan

gate_predicates: Results and Methods require topical subheadings
substages.objective: Define every manuscript section and venue structural rule before writing.
substages.title: Section contract blueprint

gate_predicates: abstract word count respects sourced budget
abstract citation style follows content type
abstract claims map to claim IDs
substages.objective: Create high-level framing without overselling.
substages.title: Title, subtitle, and abstract strategy

gate_predicates: each subsection maps to figure and artifact IDs
substages.objective: Break Results into evidence-locked drafting units.
substages.title: Results subsection architecture

gate_predicates: every Results paragraph has a PARA ID
substages.objective: Draft Results in figure-locked order.
substages.title: Results drafting pass

gate_predicates: external claims map to reference IDs
substages.objective: Draft citation-bound Introduction through resolved references.
substages.title: Introduction literature binding

gate_predicates: no limitation converted into strength without evidence
substages.objective: Plan limitation-aware Discussion before drafting.
substages.title: Discussion interpretation map

substages.objective: Draft balanced Discussion with no subheadings.
substages.title: Discussion drafting pass

gate_predicates: methods statements map to repo path and commit
dataset references include version and date
substages.objective: Build Methods structure from repository implementation and Stage 7 artifacts.
substages.title: Methods architecture

gate_predicates: every Methods claim has a methods statement ID
substages.objective: Draft reviewer-reconstructable Methods.
substages.title: Methods drafting pass

gate_predicates: PanelForge version DOI and render command are recorded when figures have been rendered
substages.objective: Create precise availability statements and required Reporting Summary placeholder.
substages.title: Software, data, and code availability assembly

gate_predicates: items are callable from main text
no new claim ID absent from claim freeze
substages.objective: Move technical depth into structured Supplementary Methods.
substages.title: Supplementary Methods drafting

gate_predicates: each table has callout and role
figure-source mapping records PanelForge recipe and render path after 9.6b
substages.objective: Build supplementary tables as reviewable evidence objects.
substages.title: Supplementary tables and source-data binding

gate_predicates: references resolve with DOI or PMID
retraction checks are clear or justified
substages.objective: Resolve and audit complete reference library.
substages.title: Reference library and citation audit

substages.objective: Check manuscript consistency by relational joins over keyed ledgers.
substages.title: Cross-document consistency audit

substages.objective: Recompute reported numbers from frozen artifacts and diff manuscript text.
substages.title: Statistical and quantitative language audit

gate_predicates: each figure and table has legend
legends do not assert absent claims
legend seed text does not inherit PanelForge S3 provenance
substages.objective: Make display items self-contained and precise.
substages.title: Figure legend and caption audit

substages.objective: Improve scientific clarity without changing meaning.
substages.title: Editorial polish pass I

substages.objective: Tune venue style and readability without broadening claims.
substages.title: Editorial polish pass II

gate_predicates: no internal ID tokens on reader-facing surfaces
no stage or substage references on reader-facing surfaces
legends and captions are free of lineage language
PanelForge manifest S3 provenance is not cross-referenced from S1 reader-facing keys
substages.objective: Strip internal IDs and build-language from reader-facing surfaces before assembly.
substages.title: Reader-surface hygiene gate

substages.objective: Stress-test the manuscript with eight reviewer perspectives.
substages.title: Internal peer review simulation

substages.objective: Assemble complete manuscript and submission package after hygiene gate.
substages.title: Submission package assembly

gate_predicates: packet covers thesis, claims, figures, risks, limitations, objections, decisions, venue fit, and open items
substages.objective: Prepare final human decision packet.
substages.title: Final human PI review packet

gate_predicates: package, evidence, and release versions are bound
substages.objective: Close Stage 9 with package, evidence, release, and limitation versions bound.
substages.title: Roadmap closure and version binding
